political.amt: $2.2 million (Save Our Home Planet Action contributions in 2024); $100,000+ annual political donations

charity.amt: $100+ million annually (post-2022 restructuring); $1-1.5% of annual sales historically
charity.focus: Environmental conservation, climate change mitigation, public lands protection, grassroots activism

wiki.extract: Patagonia, Inc. is an American retailer of outdoor recreation clothing, equipment, and food. It was founded by Yvon Chouinard in 1973 and is based in Ventura, California. Patagonia operates stores in over ten countries, and factories in sixteen countries. It markets itself as a social justice focused brand. From 2007 to 2021, Patagonia has been found to use and benefit from factories that use human trafficking and forced labor, in violation of its own public standards.

topHazards.label: The snaps in the bodysuit of the recalled base layer sets can detach, posing a choking hazard if mouthed by infants.

sampleRecalls.title: Patagonia Recalls Patagonia Infant Capilene Midweight Base Layer Sets Due to Choking Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Patagonia Infant Capilene Midweight Base Layer Sets, sold in sizes 0 months through 24 months with style number 60910. Each set consists of a knitted polyester long sleeved bodysuit with snaps at the left shoulder and at the crotch, and a pair of matching knitted polyester pants with an elastic wa…
hazards: The snaps in the bodysuit of the recalled base layer sets can detach, posing a choking hazard if mouthed by infants.
injuries: Patagonia has received one report of a snap detaching from the shoulder of the bodysuit and being mouthed by a baby.
products: Infant Capilene Midweight Base Layer Sets
units: About 8,000 (In addition, about 217 were sold in Canada)

sampleRecalls.title: CPSC, Patagonia Inc. Announce Penguino Stuffed Toy Recall
sampleRecalls.description: March 9, 1995 Release # 95-090 Washington, DC - CPSC, Patagonia Inc. of Ventura, Calif., is voluntarily recalling 3,000 of its Patagonia Penguino stuffed penguin toys. The toy's plastic eyes may detach, creating a potential choking hazard for young children.The Penguino, made of pile and Synchilla , a soft, fuzzy mate…
